parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: multi_attach
parameters.description: Whether the volume supports multiple instance attachments; default is false.

parameters.name: is_encrypt
parameters.description: Whether the volume is encrypted; default is false. Shared, ISCSI, FAST-SSD, and XSSD volumes cannot be encrypted.

parameters.name: kms_uuid
parameters.description: KMS key UUID for an encrypted volume; an empty value uses the default key.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0.

parameters.name: disk_mode
parameters.description: Volume access mode: VBD, ISCSI, or FCSAN.

parameters.name: disk_type
parameters.description: Volume type: SATA, SAS, SSD, FAST-SSD, or XSSD-0 through XSSD-3. SAS alone supports FCSAN; FAST-SSD and XSSD do not support ISCSI, and XSSD does not support encryption.

parameters.name: disk_name
parameters.description: Volume name containing 2-64 letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens; it cannot start with punctuation.

parameters.name: disk_size
parameters.description: Data-volume capacity in GB: 10-32768 for SATA, SAS, SSD, and FAST-SSD; XSSD tier minima vary from 10 to 1024 GB and support up to 65536 GB.

parameters.name: on_demand
parameters.description: Whether the volume uses on-demand billing; default is true.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Billing cycle type: year or month; required when on-demand billing is false.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Billing cycle count; required when on-demand billing is false, with a maximum of five years or 60 months.

parameters.name: image_id
parameters.description: Private or shared data-volume image ID. The new volume must be in the source region and at least as large; batch creation, encryption, ISCSI, and FCSAN are unsupported.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability zone name; required in a multi-AZ region and unnecessary in a single-AZ region.

parameters.name: provisioned_iops
parameters.description: Additional provisioned IOPS for an XSSD volume, starting at 0; the upper bound depends on the XSSD tier and capacity.

parameters.name: delete_snap_with_ebs
parameters.description: Whether all snapshots are deleted with the volume; default is false and is supported only in East China 1 and North China 2.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: JSON array of labels to assign to the resource.

parameters.name: backup_id
parameters.description: Available volume backup ID used as the source. The new VBD volume must be at least as large as the source and inherits its encryption setting.

parameters.name: dec_pool_id
parameters.description: Dedicated storage pool ID.

parameters.name: volume_description
parameters.description: Volume description.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Target instance ID.

parameters.name: delete_disk_with_instance
parameters.description: Whether the volume is released with its instance; default is false and available only for unattached or attached on-demand, non-shared volumes.

examples: ctyun evs volume create --disk-mode VBD --disk-type SATA --disk-size 10

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.

parameters.name: disk_id
parameters.description: Target volume ID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: delete_snap_with_ebs
parameters.description: Whether snapshots are deleted with the volume; must be true in regions that support snapshots and must be omitted elsewhere.

parameters.name: disk_size
parameters.description: Target volume capacity in GB. Capacity can grow only; supported data-volume and system-volume ranges depend on the storage type.

parameters.name: disk_id
parameters.description: Target volume ID.

parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Page number; default is 1 and ignored when token pagination is selected.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Results per page; default is 10, maximum is 300, and the value is ignored when token pagination is selected.

parameters.name: dec_pool_id
parameters.description: Dedicated storage pool ID.

parameters.name: dec_pool_name
parameters.description: Dedicated storage pool name.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability zone name used to scope the request.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID.

parameters.name: disk_type
parameters.description: Volume type filter: SATA, SAS, SSD, FAST-SSD, or XSSD-0 through XSSD-3.

parameters.name: disk_mode
parameters.description: Volume access-mode filter: VBD, ISCSI, or FCSAN.

parameters.name: disk_status
parameters.description: Volume status filter: in-use, available, diskAttaching, detaching, creating, expired, or freezing.

parameters.name: multi_attach
parameters.description: Whether the volume supports attachment to multiple instances.

parameters.name: is_system_volume
parameters.description: Whether to return system volumes.

parameters.name: is_encrypt
parameters.description: Whether the volume is encrypted.

parameters.name: query_content
parameters.description: Text matched against volume and attached-instance identifiers or names.

parameters.name: query_keys
parameters.description: Comma-separated fuzzy-search fields: name, diskID, instanceID, or instanceName; effective only with query content.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum token-paginated results; default is 10 and maximum is 1000. Using it disables page number and page size.

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: Continuation token for token pagination. Using it disables page number and page size.

parameters.name: delete_disk_with_instance
parameters.description: Whether the volume is released with its attached instance.

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token used for idempotency when snapshot creation goes through the order workflow.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: snapshot_name
parameters.description: Snapshot name containing 2-63 letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens and starting with a letter or digit.

parameters.name: disk_id
parameters.description: Target volume ID.

parameters.name: retention_policy
parameters.description: Snapshot retention policy: custom or forever.

parameters.name: retention_time
parameters.description: Custom retention period from 1 to 65535 days; required for the custom policy and automatically 65535 for forever.

examples: ctyun evs snapshot create --snapshot-name snapshot-001 --disk-id 36e88a58-1ebf-40ac-91b6-a8c0eca38314 --retention-policy custom --retention-time 7

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: snapshot_ids
parameters.description: Volume snapshot IDs.

parameters.name: refund_order
parameters.description: Whether to delete every snapshot for the volume and cancel the snapshot order; default is false.

parameters.name: volume_attr
parameters.description: Volume attribute filter: data or system.

parameters.name: retention_policy
parameters.description: Snapshot retention-policy filter: forever or custom.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum token-paginated snapshots; default is 10 and maximum is 1000 when nextToken is supplied.

parameters.description: Continuation token returned by the previous request.
